umm.digiquilt.savehandler
Class DQPClient

java.lang.Object
  umm.digiquilt.savehandler.DQPClient

public class DQPClient
extends Object

Handles negotiation with a DigiQuilt server. A connection can be given to this object, which will help facilitate talking to the server. Note that a DQPClient object can only be used once, after it has finished talking to the server it will close all connections and become unusable. You will need to create another connection and give it to a brand new DQPClient in order to do something else.

Version:
$Revision: 1.1 $
Author:
Jason Biatek, last changed by $Author: biatekjt $ on $Date: 2009-07-20 22:34:34 $

Constructor Detail

DQPClient

public DQPClient(InputStream in,
                 OutputStream out)
Create a new DQPClient, which will handle the given connection to a server. Once a command is done, this DQPClient and these connections will be closed and unusable.

Parameters:
in -
out -
Method Detail

list

public List<String> list()
                  throws IOException
Perform a LIST command on the server and close this connection.

Returns:
a list containing each line of the server's response.
Throws:
IOException - if an I/O error occurs, or the server reports an error.

get

public byte[] get(String filename)
           throws IOException
Request the contents of a file from the server. The contents of the file will be written to the given OutputStream.

Parameters:
filename - The file on the server to GET.
Returns:
The contents of the file from the server.
Throws:
IOException - if an I/O error occurs, or if the server reports an error.

put

public void put(String filename,
                byte[] data)
         throws IOException
Attempt to PUT a file onto the server using the given filename and data.

Parameters:
filename -
data - the contents of the file
Throws:
IOException - if an I/O error occurs or if the server reports an error.

autosave

public void autosave(String studentName,
                     SaveXML xml)
              throws IOException
Attempt to AUTOSAVE to the server with the given student name and XML.

Parameters:
studentName -
xml -
Throws:
IOException - if an I/O error occurs or if the server reports an error.

append

public void append(String filename,
                   String... contents)
            throws IOException
Append to a file on the server. This will be denied if you specify a file other than the name file.

Parameters:
filename - The file to append to (must be names.txt)
contents - The line(s) of text to write to the file
Throws:
IOException

addChallenges

public void addChallenges(List<Challenge> challenges)
                   throws IOException
Parameters:
challenges -
Throws:
IOException

isClosed

public boolean isClosed()
Returns:
true if this DQPClient has been used, false if it is still open.
